Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blood aura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — A blood aura was choking the air at Lastleaf Fortress.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — Blood aura is a type of aura that can flood the air and affect flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Blood aura can cover a horizon like a cloud bank.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Certain meats can increase the density of blood aura.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — A blood artist can cause a spike in blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider has an unmatched connection to blood aura.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider uses blood aura to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — A giant's body contains a blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby cycles a blood aura from the Heart's Gem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — A blood aura can seize a person's heart.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The blood aura was intense enough to cause bleeding from the eyes and scratches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The blood aura in the labyrinth has not been sipped away by hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The massive body of the creature was full of blood aura.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin has been replenishing her spirit with blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon commands blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The blood aura in the air can attempt to kill people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin used blood aura to make the flying lizard shudder.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin incorporates blood aura into her cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Blood aura can be used to stop regeneration.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
